title: trifolium badium subsp. spadiceum
intro: Trifolium badium subsp. spadiceum, also known as the autumnal clover, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the legume family and native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trifolium badium subsp. spadiceum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to support immune function and overall well-being.
